holdings.infoBox: CARK is an equity ETF with a total of 28 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 15.53%, Alphabet at 10.51%, Apple at 6.96%, Microsoft at 6.47%, and Lam Research at 5.96%.

overview.description: The CastleArk Large Growth ETF (CARK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of large-cap growth companies. Securities are selected using a mix of quantitative metrics and a bottom-up fundamental approach. CARK was launched on Dec 6, 2023 and is issued by CastleArk.
